transcript.text:
135 of them
[Did I hear that right...?]
[Yes, that's right]
[Today's Mukbang: 135 Steamed Scallops]
[Is it possible to plate them all?]
[Totally possible]
This is a scallop mountain
[With lots of cheese fondue]
[Cheese pull]
[A ruthless mukbang scene]
It was stacked like this
Hello everyone
I'm here at Munjeong-dong
I've been craving some clams so I'm here for some
This place has steamed scallops
Over here

[Jjimagi] [Seoul, Songpa-gu]
Hello~
[The menu]
The picture I found online is what brought me here
I want a pile of it I wonder up to how many servings I can order
Excuse me
Can I have a pile of scallops?
I can see what I can do
[Let's stack it as high as possible]
135 of them
[All of these in 1 pile?]
[Just you wait!]
[Something big is coming..]
[Here you are]
[Amazing] This is a mountain
Bon appetit

Open it up
It's hot hot hot!
That's meaty
I'll eat it as it is
[An octopus on top too?]
No extra seasoning is needed
No need for soy sauce or chili paste
[The owner is still in disbelief]
Look at that juice
[Mozzarella]
Thank you
[Fondue to enjoy with scallops]
Scallops are my favorite out of all the clams
With chojang (chili paste with vinegar)
Clams are the best
Gather all the meat in 1 shell

A little bit of chojang
Cheese too
On top
This won't work
Was I too greedy?
[Perfectly rational...]
It's been a while since I had clams
It tastes so good if you have it once in a while
Open it up
And drink
[Kimchi and scallop combo?]
That's good!
It's not bad at all
Clams are always delicious
Soy sauce
Gather in 1 shell

Kimchi on top
Alcohol is necessary when eating steamed clams
I can see cabbage and bean sprouts cooking on the bottom
[Still has the cheese pull!]
It's already this full
It's gotten a little hard
I'll need to get this one reheated Bye cheese
Did you just get started?
I ate about this much so far
You're so much prettier in person
-I came from the hospital to see you -Really?
[He's really in a hospital gown]
Where does all of that go to?
[It's literally this much]
[Fulfilled his wish...]
Did you take a motorcycle here?

[Can't miss out on seeing Tzuyang]
[Reheated cheese] Thank you
[All nice and melted again]
I need to use the scissors
The cheese pull is great on this one
Scallop inside cheese
That's a nice restaurant name
Look at the size!
Chojang is good too
I don't usually dip too much chojang because it takes away the clam's flavors
It's best to keep its original flavors
[Got some on here]
This is it
[It makes me move...]
The soup is really incredible
I'm craving some soju now

Gather the scallops in the cheese bowl
Let's drink some soup now
Lovely
Check this out It's full
I'm not even halfway done
Tasty
I'll scoot these in now
It's a whole new grill now
I'm not getting sick of the same taste
[The 2nd bucket is filling up already]
What? Is this all I have left?
I ate too fast
I ate without saying much today
I think 1 person can easily finish 1 large order of scallops
Maybe not?
Clams never seem to fill me up

There's a red scallop in here
Hello
Red scallop!
It tastes different
Yum
Scallops have a chewy consistency
But the red scallop is very soft
Where did it all go?
This would make a great plate
Look at the size of this thing
This looks really juicy
It exploded
Delicious
Wait...
Where did it go? Who is it?
PD?

[PD: It's painful enough to just watch]
Where does it all go to?
Over here (belly)
She will be able to finish it all without a problem
It's all over my shirt
[Scallop skewers]
Filled up 2 buckets
Let's get all the shells out
[Do we need another bucket...?]
[Scallops soaked in soup]
[1 last skewer as a finale]
Red scallop in the front
It tastes great!
Love the soup too
Did you finish it all?!
That's 3 Large orders

It went from this to this
Should I get another plate started?
That sounds tempting
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
